meta.title: Robert Julian Kratz | Software Development & IT Consulting
meta.description: Freelance software developer, specializing in web applications, IT infrastructure and AI strategy for small and medium-sized businesses.

hero.name: Robert Julian Kratz
hero.description: I build custom digital solutions for small and medium-sized businesses. As a student at the University of Mannheim, I combine academic knowledge with practical experience.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: What I can do for you

software.title: Software Development
software.description: Modern web and mobile applications using cutting-edge technologies. From concept to deployment.

infrastructure.title: IT Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Server administration, cloud architectures and reliable hosting solutions for your business.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.description: Scalable and maintainable system designs that grow with your business.

security.title: IT Security
security.description: Security audits, penetration testing and implementation of best practices to protect your data.

aiStrategy.title: IT & AI Strategy
aiStrategy.description: Strategic consulting on digital transformation and integration of AI into your business processes.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Search engine optimization for better visibility and more organic traffic on your website.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Support
maintenance.description: Live monitoring, proactive maintenance and fast support for your existing systems and applications. Updates, bug fixes, performance optimization and ongoing improvements to ensure your digital solutions run smoothly and efficiently.
